subcodes.first_line: O thou fresh plant in the garden of the Love of God! What thou hast written was considered. It was an evidence of following in the Pathway of Guidance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان محبت الله آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید دلیل بر سلوک در سبیل هدی
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @praise and encouragement
